title: Customizing Your Locker
bodyHtml:
You can customize your locker's look and contents — choose which apps appear, change the background color, pick a font, and rearrange your layout.

The toolbar (desktop)

The small toolbar at the top of your locker has everything you need:

  • App icons — tap to toggle each app on or off. Active apps appear as panes below. You can have up to 3 apps active at once.
  • Locker color button — tap the colored circle to open the color picker and change your locker's background. See Locker Color for more.
  • Font dropdown — pick a font for your apps, including dyslexia-friendly options like Lexend, Nunito, OpenDyslexic, and Comic Sans.

Rearranging panes (desktop)

  • Reorder — drag a pane's header onto another pane to swap their positions
  • Resize — drag the divider between two panes to make one wider or narrower
  • Maximize — use the maximize button in the pane header to make a pane fill the locker; minimize to bring the others back
  • Close — use the close button in the pane header to deactivate that app

On mobile

On your phone, all four apps are always available — just swipe between them. There's no toggling or rearranging on mobile.

Saving

Your changes save automatically — there's no save button to remember.
description: How to customize your locker: toggle apps, rearrange panes, change color, and pick a font.
